content.full_text:
FAIR p OLITICAL p RACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento. CA 95814-2329 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
David Bauer, Accountant 
2150 River Plaza Dr., Suite 150 
Sacramento, CA 95833 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our file No. 12-015 
Dear Mr. Bauer: 
March 27, 2012 
This letter responds to your request for advice regarding slate mailer provisions of the 
Political Reform Act (the "Act"). 1 
QUESTION 
Does the Government Code section 84108 reference to Code section 84100 require Team 
California to have a treasurer? 
CONCLUSION 
Yes. The slate mail organization has to list the name of its treasurer on their statement of 
organization under Section 84108(b)(2). 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel 
/s/ via telephone 
By: 
William J. Blenkeit 
Counsel, Legal Division 
WJB:jgl 
1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 8 IOOO through 91014. All statutory 
references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices 
Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All 
regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.
